name: Moonlit Dock Art Direction
artBrief: A readable moonlit harbor dock for a classic point-and-click adventure, with clear prop silhouettes and warm tavern light.

context.artBrief: A readable moonlit harbor dock for a classic point-and-click adventure, with clear prop silhouettes and warm tavern light.

outputs.sceneBackgroundPrompt: Paint a clean 1280x720 moonlit harbor dock background for a classic point-and-click adventure. Keep the tavern entrance readable, leave room for foreground props, use warm lantern light against cool blue moonlight, and avoid embedding inventory objects that should be separate layers.

propPrompts.prompt: A rusty iron hook prop for a point-and-click inventory pickup, readable silhouette, isolated object, clean PNG alpha edge, transparent background, matching warm moonlit dock lighting.

characterReferencePrompts.prompt: Transparent alpha full-body character reference for Mara, an adventure-game protagonist suited for a moonlit harbor setting, clear foot pivot, readable silhouette, neutral standing pose, visible feet.

Sprite sheet for Mara on a flat #00A2FF chroma-blue background. Include idle, walk, and talk frames in a clean grid, consistent scale, visible feet, stable foot origin, no transparency required before chroma cleanup.

animationNotes: Keep character origin at the feet for depth sorting.
Generate short walk and talk clips from a stable three-quarter character reference before extracting frames.
outputs.negativePrompt: blurry, cropped, unreadable silhouettes, extra text, UI elements, embedded watermarks, distorted hands
styleNotes: Warm tavern light contrasted with cool moonlight
Painterly but clean enough for hotspot authoring

generationTargets.safetyNegativePrompt: transparent background, floating isolated props, UI, text, logo, watermark
background, floor shadow baked into alpha, cropped object, multiple objects
background, cropped feet, extra characters, duplicate character, inconsistent costume
transparent alpha, detailed background, perspective floor, cropped feet, inconsistent frame size

suggestedActors.label: Rusty Hook
suggestedActors.visualPrompt: A rusty iron hook prop with transparent background, sized for the dock floor near a crate.
